tests.source_program:
declare i8 @llvm.ucmp.i8.i32(i32, i32)

define i8 @ucmp_three_cases_neg1_zero_merge(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
  %res = call i8 @llvm.ucmp.i8.i32(i32 %a, i32 %b)
  switch i8 %res, label %default [
    i8 -1, label %bb2
    i8 0, label %bb2
    i8 1, label %bb1
  ]

default:
  ret i8 2

bb1:
  ret i8 1

bb2:
  ret i8 2
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
declare i8 @llvm.ucmp.i8.i32(i32, i32)

define i8 @ucmp_three_cases_neg1_zero_merge(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
  %cmp = icmp ugt i32 %a, %b
  br i1 %cmp, label %bb1, label %bb2

bb1:
  ret i8 1

bb2:
  ret i8 2
}

tests.source_program:
declare i8 @llvm.ucmp.i8.i32(i32, i32)

define i8 @ucmp_three_cases_reachable_default_neg1_zero(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
  %res = call i8 @llvm.ucmp.i8.i32(i32 %a, i32 %b)
  switch i8 %res, label %default [
    i8 -1, label %bb_equal_or_less
    i8 0, label %bb_equal_or_less
    i8 1, label %bb_greater
  ]

default:
  ret i8 0

bb_equal_or_less:
  ret i8 1

bb_greater:
  ret i8 2
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define i8 @ucmp_three_cases_reachable_default_neg1_zero(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
  %cmp = icmp ugt i32 %a, %b
  br i1 %cmp, label %bb_greater, label %bb_equal_or_less

bb_equal_or_less:
  ret i8 1

bb_greater:
  ret i8 2
}
